view.title: Validate persona scenario #2
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior, but the evidence provided does not include specific results or outcomes from the simulation of the persona scenario. While prior steps indicate successful bookings and catalog visibility, they do not directly address the expected results of the persona scenario, leading to an inconclusive status. The lack of concrete evidence regarding the scenario's execution and outcome prevents a definitive assessment.
